title: PERSONAL FINANCIAL COUNSELING - 211info
text: CONSUMER CREDIT COUNSELING SERVICE OF SOUTHERN OREGON INC PERSONAL FINANCIAL COUNSELING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides financial counseling, pre or post-purchase counseling and education, and reverse mortgage counseling. 820 Crater Lake Avenue Suite 202 Medford, OR 97504 Eligibility: Unrestricted, except for reverse mortgage counseling where the homeowner must be age 62 or older with sizable equity in their home Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-12:30pm and 1:30pm-5pm Email (541) 779-2273 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 779-2273 [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment. Worksheet for services (except reverse mortgage counseling) available on website or by calling to request one. FEES: None for credit or debt counseling. Fee may apply for other services. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: On Crater Lake Avenue between Stevens and McAndrews in the Cedar Mall Services: Credit Counseling Homebuyer/Home Purchase Counseling Personal Financial Counseling Reverse Mortgage Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: MONEY MANAGEMENT - CREDIT REPORT REVIEW MONEY MANAGEMENT - PRE-FILING BANKRUPTCY COUNSELING PRE-DISCHARGE FINANCIAL EDUCATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CONSUMER CREDIT COUNSELING SERVICE OF SOUTHERN OREGON INC
